name: Cricket Frenzy Ultimate | Bat like a Pro

reviews.review_description: It is so good that it almost matches the level of IB cricket. Really immersive and the gameplay mechanics are really good, eagerly waiting for more updates.  Almost makes you feel like you are standing in a real cricket stadium. Also it is good for shadowing your batting skills and playing in real life with proper cricketing shots. Kudos to the developer!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your amazing review! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the immersive experience and gameplay mechanics of our cricket game. Your comparison to IB Cricket means a lot, and we're glad it’s helping you enhance your batting skills! We're constantly working on updates to make the game even better, so stay tuned for more exciting features. Your support and kind words inspire us to keep improving. Kudos to players like you who make this journey worthwhile!

reviews.review_description: I love the new custom ball options that lets me practice different ball types with such level of customisation. Eagerly waiting for all the new updates.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback! 😊 We're thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the new custom ball options. We’re working hard to bring even more exciting updates, and it's great to know you're looking forward to them. Stay tuned – we can’t wait to bring you more ways to enhance your cricket skills and make the game even better. Happy playing, and thanks for being a part of the Cricket Frenzy community!
